# Healing Hands By Nate

Therapeutic massage, Reiki, and life coaching practice in Union, Missouri,
operated by Nate — a Licensed Massage Therapist, Reiki Master, and Certified
Life Coach with 12+ years of experience.

## Practitioner

Nate is a Licensed Massage Therapist (LMT), Reiki Master, and Certified Life
Coach with over 12 years of professional experience. He sees clients out of
Essence Salon and Spa LLC at 15 S Oak St, Union, Missouri 63084.

## Location and contact

- Address: 15 S Oak St, Union, MO 63084
- Phone: 636-744-1770
- Located at: Essence Salon and Spa LLC
- Service area: Union, Washington, Pacific, St. Clair, Sullivan, and the
  greater Franklin County, Missouri area
- Hours: Monday, Wednesday, Friday 9am – 5pm; Saturday by appointment;
  closed Tuesday, Thursday, Sunday

## Booking

Sessions are booked through Vagaro at:
https://www.vagaro.com/essencesalonandspallc

## Services

The practice offers ten distinct modalities:

- **Swedish Massage** — classic, full-body relaxation; long flowing strokes,
  light to medium pressure. Best for first-time massage clients, stress, and
  sleep issues.
- **Deep Tissue Massage** — slow, focused pressure for chronic knots, lower
  back pain, and stubborn tension. Best for desk workers, manual laborers, and
  athletes between training cycles.
- **Sports Massage** — performance, recovery, and injury prevention work for
  active bodies. Pre-event, post-event, and ongoing maintenance.
- **Reiki Sessions** — energy work for nervous system reset, anxiety relief,
  and emotional healing. Performed by a certified Reiki Master.
- **Lomi Lomi Massage** — Hawaiian flowing bodywork using the forearms in
  long, rhythmic strokes for deep relaxation and emotional release.
- **Hot Stone Massage** — heated basalt stones for deep muscle warming and
  release; especially effective in cold months.
- **Trigger Point Therapy** — precise, sustained pressure on muscle knots to
  resolve referred pain patterns including tension headaches, sciatica
  patterns, jaw and TMJ pain.
- **Lymphatic Drainage Massage** — gentle, rhythmic technique to reduce
  swelling, support immunity, and aid post-surgical recovery.
- **Cupping Therapy** — suction cups to release stuck fascia and chronic
  tension; available standalone or as an addition to massage.
- **Life Coaching** — direct, action-oriented coaching for career
  transitions, stuck patterns, and big decisions; offered in-person or
  virtually.

## How Nate works

Nate combines manual bodywork with energy work and coaching. Sessions are
deliberate, attentive, and rooted in what each client's body is asking for —
not template massage. Most clients work across multiple modalities over time
depending on what they need.

## Resources

- Free download: The Neck Reset PDF — a five-minute self-care sequence for
  chronic neck pain. Available at /neck-reset
- Journal: ongoing notes on bodywork, recovery, and self-care at /blog
